_comment: Copy to voices.json (gitignored) and set TTS_VOICES_CONFIG to its path. Each entry under 'voices' maps a logical name (used in WebSocket {voice: ...} fields) to a merged CustomVoice checkpoint dir produced by finetuning/merge_lora.py. 'speaker' is the spk_id key registered in that checkpoint's config.json (matches --speaker_name from sft_12hz_lora.py). 'default' is the voice used when a WebSocket message omits the 'voice' field. Static-split mode: each voice loads its own base into VRAM (~3.4 GB bf16). 2 voices fit comfortably on 23 GB A10G.
